title: trifolium canescens
intro: Trifolium canescens, also known as shrubby clover, is a perennial plant in the legume family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Trifolium canescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues due to its high fiber content. Herbal preparations of Trifolium canescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used as a component in some herbal blends to support overall well-being.
